verses.book: A Treatise on the Grace of Christ, and on Original Sin.
A Treatise on the Grace of Christ, and on Original Sin.
verses.text: “De gratia christi, et de peccato originali.”

verses.book: A Treatise on the Grace of Christ, and on Original Sin.
verses.text: “After the conviction and condemnation of the Pelagian heresy with its authors by the bishops of the Church of Rome,—first Innocent, and then Zosimus,—with the co-operation of letters of African councils, I wrote two books against them: one On the Grace of Christ, and the other On Original Sin.

verses.book: A Treatise on the Grace of Christ, and on Original Sin.
verses.text: The work began with the following words: ‘How greatly we rejoice on account of your bodily, and, above all, because of your Spiritual welfare.’”
